prompt: Write a Java 25 event processing system. Create a sealed interface Event with record subtypes: UserCreated(String userId, String email), OrderPlaced(String orderId, String userId, List<String> items), and PaymentProcessed(String paymentId, double amount, boolean successful). Then write an EventProcessor class with a method that processes events using pattern matching and returns a summary string. Include a method that groups events by type.

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final or final var
Uses switch expressions for event dispatch
